name: Oshkinigikwe (Tomato Stew)
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Miniature Mexican tomatoes, washed and deseeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the tomatoes in a large saucepan.
2. Add the shallots and water; simmer for 30 minutes, stirring gently occasionally.
3. Add the cucumbers, salt, and black pepper; simmer for 10 minutes, stirring until the tomatoes break up.
4. Quickly add the corn flour, 1 tablespoon at a time, stirring slowly.
5. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes and serve.
